word: No one had eaten a thing for several days.
There was no conversation at all.
My husband is a fantastic fox.
We have an entirely new set-up.
meaning: 우리는 완전히 새로운 체계를 갖추게 되었어.

word: It means that none of us need ever go out into the open again.
meaning: 그것은 우리 중 누구도 다시는 야외로 나갈 필요가 없다는 뜻이야.

word: We're never going to be shot at again in our lives.
meaning: 우리는 평생 다시 총에 맞지 않을 거야.
